servicesPage.intro: At California Auto Repair, we offer a full range of automotive services to keep your vehicle safe, reliable, and performing at its best. From routine maintenance to major repairs, our certified technicians have you covered.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert diagnosis and repair for check engine lights, performance issues, and more.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic equipment quickly identifies the root cause of engine problems — from misfires to sensor failures. We then provide a clear, written estimate before any repair work begins. Whether it's a simple spark plug replacement or a complex timing belt job, we restore your engine's performance and reliability.
benefits: Accurate computer diagnostics save time and money
Certified technicians with years of experience

process.title: Comprehensive Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic tools to read error codes and live data.

process.title: Detailed Inspection
process.description: Our mechanic inspects the affected systems and verifies the root cause.

process.title: Repair & Verification
process.description: We perform the necessary repair and re-scan to ensure everything is working perfectly.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be anything from a loose gas cap to a faulty oxygen sensor. We recommend bringing it in for a diagnostic scan to find the exact issue.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within an hour. If the issue is complex, we may need additional time for a thorough inspection.

services.title: Brake Service & Repair
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspections, pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, and fluid flushes.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. We inspect every component — pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and fluid — and recommend only what's necessary. Our precision machining ensures smooth, quiet stopping power, and we use premium parts for long-lasting performance.

process.title: Visual & Mechanical Inspection
process.description: We check pad thickness, rotor condition, caliper function, and brake fluid level.

process.title: Precision Service
process.description: We replace worn parts, resurface or replace rotors, and flush old fluid as needed.

process.title: Test Drive & Adjustment
process.description: A test drive ensures proper brake feel and performance before you leave.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000–50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits. We inspect them at every service and let you know when it's time.

faqs.question: What does a brake fluid flush do?
faqs.answer: Brake fluid absorbs moisture over time, which can cause corrosion and reduce braking performance. A flush removes old fluid and replaces it with fresh, high-boiling-point fluid.

services.title: Oil Change & Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Fast, professional oil changes with a complimentary 21-point inspection.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the best way to extend your engine's life. We use quality oil and filters, and every oil change includes a free 21-point inspection covering belts, hoses, fluid levels, tire pressure, and more. Our goal is to catch small issues before they become big problems.
benefits: Extends engine life and improves fuel economy
Quick turnaround — most done in under 30 minutes
Competitive pricing with no hidden fees

process.title: Drain & Replace Oil
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and fill with the correct grade of new oil.

process.title: 21-Point Inspection
process.description: We check belts, hoses, fluids, tires, lights, and more, noting any concerns.

process.title: Reset & Review
process.description: We reset your oil life monitor and review the inspection results with you.

faqs.question: What type of oil does my car need?
faqs.answer: We follow manufacturer recommendations, whether conventional, synthetic blend, or full synthetic. We'll use the right oil for your vehicle.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern cars need an oil change every 5,000–7,500 miles, but check your owner's manual. We'll remind you when you're due.

services.title: AC Service & Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin cool with AC inspections, recharges, and component repairs.
services.longDescription: Texas heat demands a reliable AC system. We diagnose and repair all AC issues, from weak airflow to no cooling at all. Our service includes pressure testing, leak detection, refrigerant recharge, and component replacement (compressor, condenser, evaporator). We ensure your system blows ice-cold air all summer long.

process.title: System Evaluation
process.description: We check vent temperature, pressure readings, and inspect for visible leaks.

process.title: Leak Detection & Repair
process.description: Using UV dye and electronic detectors, we find and fix any leaks.

process.title: Recharge & Performance Test
process.description: We evacuate the system, recharge with the correct amount of refrigerant, and verify cooling performance.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a failing compressor, or a blocked condenser. We'll diagnose the exact cause and provide a repair plan.

faqs.question: How often should I service my car's AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an AC check every two years or if you notice reduced cooling. Regular service prevents costly breakdowns.

about.headline: Your Neighborhood Auto Repair Experts
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repairs that keep Dallas drivers safe and mobile, with transparent pricing and exceptional customer service.
story: California Auto Repair was founded in 2005 by master technician Carlos Martinez, who saw a need for trustworthy, affordable auto care in the Lake June area. Starting with a small two-bay shop, Carlos built a reputation for meticulous work and fair dealing — earning the loyalty of generations of Dallas families.

Today, our expanded facility serves thousands of customers annually, but our values remain the same: diagnose accurately, repair thoroughly, and treat every customer like a neighbor. We invest in the latest tools and continuous training so that your car — whether a 10-year-old sedan or a brand-new SUV — gets the best care possible.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We never recommend repairs you don't need. Every recommendation is backed by evidence and a clear explanation.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use premium parts and follow manufacturer specifications to ensure lasting repairs.

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.description: You get a written estimate before any work, and we welcome you to see the shop and ask questions.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to be a locally owned business that supports Dallas families, schools, and events.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule? Call us or fill out the form below, and we'll get your car back on the road quickly.
